name: Tuna Taylor Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 6-1/2 oz can Tuna - drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the drained and flaked tuna, shredded Swiss cheese, chopped celery, finely chopped onion, mayonnaise, sour cream, and pepper.
2. Spread the mixture onto the rye bread slices.
3. Serve immediately. Makes 8 sandwiches.
